text: Order 1001: 50 laptops shipped on 2025-01-01 via route A1 with arrival on 2025-01-05. Delay: 0 hours. Product not hazardous.
Order 1004: 80 headphones shipped on 2025-01-04 via route B2 with arrival on 2025-01-08. Delay: 1 hour. Product not hazardous.
On 2025-01-10, a Cessna 172 crashed in California. There was 1 fatality and 0 minor injuries. Probable cause: pilot error due to weather conditions.
Recall FDA1: On 2025-05-10, Drug A was recalled due to contamination. This was a Class I recall with high severity.
